goal: Continuum Lift Conditions and Screen-Only Dictionary Obstruction
claim_boundary: conditional lift-obstruction theorem schema only; no continuum de Sitter, dS/CFT, or ER=EPR construction is claimed

major_claims.claim: The finite-to-continuum lift conditions are explicit.
Approximate consecutive UCP embeddings are available as a finite replacement for exact full-matrix inclusions.
The approximate embedding errors decrease in the bounded family.
A screen-only dictionary is incomplete under the lift conditions when screen shadows collide and response witnesses stay separated.

frontier: instantiate the lift conditions with a canonical fuzzy-sphere/static-patch embedding
prove response-witness persistence for a physical regulator family
upgrade the theorem schema to a continuum operator-algebra theorem
